description: Versioned Isabella learning stream for CAP-047. Packages are global-scope and tenant-safe (no tenant data). Ingestion reuses the Knowledge OS (knowledge_packages/versions/localizations/chunks) into the non-production environment first; rollback = re-point is_current to the previous version.

governance.tenant_isolation: global packages only; runtime tenant signals are designed in M7 and stored per-tenant
governance.rollback: previous knowledge_package_versions row remains; demote current version to restore

sources: Project360 spec: PMO Process Intelligence Module Specification v1 (2026-07-23)
